Title: User Registration Verification
Preconditions: User is attempting to log in for the first time.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login.
2. Application checks if the user is registered.
3. Application requests registration status from the database.
4. Database responds with "Not Registered".
5. Application sends homepage to the user.
Expected Result: User is prompted to register before accessing the homepage.

Title: Successful User Login
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login.
2. Application checks if the user is registered.
3. Application requests registration status from the database.
4. Database responds with "Registered".
5. Application sends homepage to the user.
Expected Result: User successfully logs in and is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Invalid User Credentials
Preconditions: User attempts to log in with incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login.
2. Application checks if the user is registered.
3. Application requests registration status from the database.
4. Database responds with "Not Registered".
5. Application sends homepage to the user.
Expected Result: User is informed that the username or password is incorrect.

Title: Production Data Association
Preconditions: User has initiated a production process.
Test Data: ID: 1, Utente: "user1", Modello: "modelA", Footprint produzione: "100kgCO2", Footprint totale: "200kgCO2"
Test Steps:
1. Utente creates a new production entry.
2. Produzione associates the entry with Utente.
3. Produzione associates the entry with Modello.
4. Produzione associates the entry with Footprint produzione.
5. Produzione associates the entry with Footprint totale.
Expected Result: Production data is correctly associated with all relevant entities.

Title: Material Data Association
Test Data: Formula chimica: "H2O", Deposizione: 50, Percentuale Presenza: 75, Carbon footprint: "5kgCO2"
Test Steps:
1. Utente adds material data.
2. Materiale associates the data with Formula Chimica.
3. Materiale associates the data with Deposizione.
4. Materiale associates the data with Percentuale Presenza.
5. Materiale associates the data with Carbon Footprint.
Expected Result: Material data is correctly associated with all relevant attributes.
